summary: Comprehensive backend + frontend testing for M&A Precision Mechanical website. All 10 backend tests pass (health, root, booking CRUD, validation 400/422, _id exclusion, sort order). Frontend: hero, 4 service cards, sticky header, tel: links, Google CTA, mobile floating call all working. Booking form complete flow (fill all fields → date picker → time slot → submit → success message with booking ID) succeeded. Empty submit shows validation toast as expected.
critical_code_review_comments: Resend integration: backend correctly uses asyncio.to_thread + does not fail booking on email error (email_sent=false, email_error captured). Verified via response. NOTE: With current free Resend tier, emails to precisionfix12@gmail.com may fail (unverified domain) — this is expected per design.
Mongo _id properly excluded from both POST and GET responses via projection {_id: 0}.
Validation: service_type whitelist enforced via 400; Pydantic handles 422 for email/missing fields. Good.

Frontend booking form has HTML5 'required' attributes which prevents the JS-level toast validation from running on truly empty submits in real browser flow — currently both layers exist, which is fine. Consider: input type=tel with no pattern allows arbitrary text; ok for MVP.

Minor enhancement: Backend datetime stored as ISO string then parsed back to datetime on GET — acceptable, but using a real datetime field with native Mongo Date would be cleaner for sort/range queries.
test_credentials: N/A - no auth in this app
seed_data_creation: Test bookings created with TEST_ prefix (TEST_John Smith, TEST_E2E User, TEST_Diagnostics_user, TEST_Repair_user, TEST_Maintenance_user). Stored in test_database.bookings collection.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend uses MongoDB local + Resend API. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_bookings.py covers all booking endpoints. Frontend testid coverage is excellent. Booking date picker uses react-day-picker — to programmatically pick a date, locate buttons in [data-testid='booking-date-popover'] with text matching /^\d+$/ and click first non-disabled. For time slot, click [data-testid='booking-select-time-trigger'] then [role='option']. Resend may return error for unverified recipient domains; backend correctly returns 200 with email_sent=false in that case.
